key.name: history-size
key.description: Maximum number of items to keep in history.

key.name: persist-history
key.description: Save clipboard history to disk across reboots (affects text items only).

key.name: history-shortcut
key.description: Shortcut to open the clipboard history menu.

key.name: clear-history
key.description: Trigger key to clear clipboard history.

key.name: trim-whitespaces
key.description: Trim whitespaces at the beginning and end of copied text.
